articles.author: Sarfraz Khan
articles.title: Pulsar Crams A Noctua Fan In Its Feinmann FO1 Gaming Mouse While Retaining Its Lightweight Design; Release Date Revealed - Wccftech
articles.description: Pulsar's Feinmann F01 Noctua Edition launches on July 21, 2026, featuring a 5V PWM fan, 42,000 DPI, and weighing 73 grams for sweat-free gaming.
articles.content:
This might be one of the first branded-gaming mice ever to have an active cooling solution installed inside.
This may be an unusual innovation, but it's practical if you are an avid gamer. Pulsar's … [+2167 chars]
